Name: updateUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "email_verified" = $1::bool, "phone_number_verified" = $2::bool WHERE users."is_anonymous" = $3::bool RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."email_verified" AS "emailVerified", mutation_result."phone_number_verified" AS "phoneNumberVerified" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
